name: organization-ai-skills
description: Generic Agent Skills for organizational knowledge work, for Claude and ChatGPT. Grouped into installable plugins so admins can preinstall some for everyone and offer others per team.

plugins.name: org-research
plugins.description: Web research, tool routing, LinkedIn and Reddit scraping.

plugins.name: org-content
plugins.description: Content and comms drafting: blog, social, press, case studies, email, events, strategy.

plugins.name: org-meetings
plugins.description: Briefing prep, meeting follow-ups, research briefs, Slack summaries.

plugins.name: org-ops
plugins.description: Asana tasks, document search, launch planning, Zapier workflows.

plugins.name: org-agents
plugins.description: Subagent delegation with a per-platform model table.
